title: asplenium exiguum subsp. lushanense
intro: Asplenium exiguum subsp. lushanense, also known as Lushan spleenwort, is a rare and endangered species of fern native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Asplenium exiguum subsp. lushanense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Asplenium exiguum subsp. lushanense can be dried and used as a tea, or combined with other herbs to create a topical salve or cream for skin care and treatment.
